description_long: This is a brightly colored beer can with a playful, cartoonish design featuring a large stylized bird head in red and yellow on the front. The can is predominantly orange and yellow, with bold red and white text and accents. The top of the can has a metallic pull tab with a red and yellow 'PULL' label, and the rim is silver. Around the can, there are various instructions, nutritional information, and additional graphics, including a small farm logo and a list of ingredients. The can appears to be made of aluminum and is likely filled with liquid, as indicated by its typical beverage can shape and size. The surface is smooth and glossy, with no visible condensation.
description: A vibrant orange and yellow beer can with a cartoon bird graphic, bold red text, and a metallic pull tab on top. The can features playful graphics, nutritional info, and a smooth, glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large red bird graphic, bold 'FOWL' text, and the pull tab on top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying usage instructions, a farm logo, and the pull tab partially raised.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the fully raised pull tab and more of the can's plain orange surface.
description_view_3: Side-rear view showing nutritional information, caution text, and the edge of the bird graphic.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a bold, cartoonish bird head in red and yellow, with large, playful typography and a mix of red, white, and yellow colors. The design is modern and eye-catching, with clear instructions and nutritional info integrated into the layout.
